name: La Potee Auvergnate (Prodigy)
recipeIngredient: 1 small Head green cabbage - cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Prick the sausages and place them in a 2-quart heavy pot with bacon and onions.
2. Cook over medium heat on top of the stove for 10 minutes.
3. Remove the sausages, setting them aside.
4. Pour off excess fat. Return the pot to the stove.
5. Add garlic, calf's foot (if using), and pork stew meat; cover and cook another 10 minutes.
6. Add beans and enough broth to barely cover. Include rosemary, thyme, bay leaves, and pepper.
7. Cover, bring to a boil, and place the pot in the oven.
8. Turn the oven to 350°F and cook for 1 hour, checking occasionally and adding water if the beans dry out.
9. Meanwhile, cut the sausages into 1-inch pieces and quarter the potatoes.
10. When the beans are soft, add salt, smoked pork, sausages, cabbage, and potatoes.
11. Replace the cover and return the pot to the oven for another 35 minutes.
12. Remove bay leaves before serving the potee in the dish used for cooking.
